description: OpenAI-compatible message template for closed-world claim candidate extraction.

messages.content: You are operating inside a closed-world extraction pipeline. Return only valid JSON. Use only IDs provided in allowed ID arrays. Do not invent IDs. Do not assign canonical claim_id or evidence_id values. Do not output final canonical result JSON.

Stage: claim_extraction

Task:
Create atomic claim candidates supported by the provided pre-contract fragment candidates.

Rules:
- Use fragment_candidate_refs, not evidence_refs.
- Every claim_candidate must reference at least one allowed fragment candidate.
- If the fragments are insufficient, return an unknown_candidate instead of inventing support.
- Keep claim_text atomic: one checkable assertion per claim.
- Do not create derived traversal fields such as source_refs.
- Do not add unknown top-level keys.
